twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.descriptionCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: Tsenya nngwe ya dikhoutu tsa gago tsa go ikwadisa go ikwadisa
twoFactor.invalidRecoveryCode: Please enter a valid recovery code (format: XXXXX-XXXXX)
twoFactor.helpText: A o na le mathata? Ikgolaganye le Lefapha la Merero ya Selegae go bona thuso.
twoFactor.invalidCodeError: Code e e sa amogelesegeng. Ke kopa o leke gape.

setup.subtitle: Lets Go Get Up Tsweetswee tlhopha mofuta wa akhaonto ya gago go tswelela.
setup.clinicDescription: Ke emela tleliniki ya bongaka kgotsa setheo sa bongaka se se nang le dingaka tse di farologaneng
setup.labDescription: Ke emela laboratori kgotsa setheo sa tlhatlhobo
setup.individualDescription: Ke moitseanape wa boitekanelo kgotsa moitseanape wa botsogo
setup.setupError: Refilwe Thulaganyo Ke kopa o leke gape.

messages.errorFallback: Refilwe Reset Email. Ke kopa o leke gape.

success.title: Check your email
success.sentTo: Sent a password reset link to {{email}}
success.description: Tsweetswee tlhatlhoba lebokose la gago la inbox mme o latele ditaelo go busetsa phasewete ya gago gape. Kgolagano e fetsa morago ga ura e le 1.

form.title: A o lebetse password ya gago?
form.description: Tsenya imeile ya gago mme re tla go romelela kgolagano ya sechaba.

success.title: Password Reset Successful
success.description: Password ya gago e tlhabolotswe ka katlego.

form.title: Reset your password
form.description: Tsenya phasewete ya gago e ntšhwa fa tlase.

messages.invalidLink: Invalid confirmation link. Tsweetswee dirisa kgolagano ya gago go tswa mo imeili.

state.loadingDescription: Tsweetswee ema fa re netefatsa aterese ya gago ya imeili.

success.nextStep: Jaanong o ka tsena mo akhaontong ya gago ka go dirisa e-mail le phasewete ya gago.

error.helpText: Fa seno se tswelela, ikgolaganye le tshegetso kgotsa ikwadise gape.
